---
title: "Documentation hub."
subtitle: "Architecture & Design Decisions"
format: 
  html:
    page-layout: full
listing:
  id: project-links
  type: grid
  grid-columns: 2
  categories: true
  filter-ui: true
  fields: [title, description, categories]
  contents:
    - title: "ratcrate-core"
      description: "The engine behind the Ratatui ecosystem. Scans crates.io and produces ratcrate.json."
      path: "rat-core/index.qmd"
      categories: [Rust, Engine]
    - title: "ratcrate-cli"
      description: "A command-line interface for exploring Ratatui crates with search and filtering."
      path: "rat-cli/index.qmd"
      categories: [Rust, CLI]
    - title: "doc2quarto"
      description: "Helper tool for turning rough notes into structured Quarto documentation."
      path: "doc2quarto/index.qmd"
      categories: [Python, Tooling]
    - title: "QBanner"
      description: "A lightweight Rust-based library for high-performance CLI Banners."
      path: "qbanner/index.qmd"
      categories: [Rust, Library]
---

# Overview

This site is primarily written for **future me** — a central repository for technical logic.


::: {.hero-section style="text-align:center; padding: 4rem 0;"}
# Documentation hub.
> Architecture Notes and Design Decisions for the 1QubitAI ecosystem.
:::

---

## Projects

::: {.grid}

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
### 🐀 ratcrate-core
**The Engine.** Scans crates.io, enriches metadata, and produces the backbone `ratcrate.json`.
[Read the Docs »](rat-core/index.qmd){.btn .btn-outline-primary .btn-sm}
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
### 💻 ratcrate-cli
**The Interface.** Search and filter the Ratatui ecosystem directly from your terminal.
[Read the Docs »](rat-cli/index.qmd){.btn .btn-outline-primary .btn-sm}
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
### ☁︎ doc2quarto
**The Pipeline.** Automated transformation of rough notes into structured Quarto books.
[Read the Docs »](doc2quarto/index.qmd){.btn .btn-outline-primary .btn-sm}
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
### ↯ QBanner
**The Visuals.** A high-performance Rust library for CLI banners and layout headers.
[Read the Docs »](qbanner/index.qmd){.btn .btn-outline-primary .btn-sm}
:::

:::

---

# About Me
I’m **Rakesh V**, a developer building tools for automation and systems logic.
